synopsis: The Rebel Alliance captures a damaged new-model Imperial warbot on Xeron and brings it to the droid-populated space station known as Kligson's Moon for repair, hoping to study it. Kligson agrees to fix the droid but intends to keep it, so R2-D2 and C-3PO must accompany the warbot to observe. The former Imperial droid trooper Zee-Exthree has his own plans, scheming to cannibalize the warbot to repair his own war droid and lead a revolt against Kligson. Anticipating the treachery, Kligson uses a decoy to lure Zee-Exthree and his followers into the open and destroys them with his own warbot. With the battle over, R2-D2 and C-3PO record the warbot's schematics and return to the Rebels, while Kligson relocates his station to a secret location beyond the Empire's reach.
title: Star Wars (1977) #47: Droid World
